completed_tasks.name: Plan 06 reviewed TUI repair implementation
completed_tasks.progress: RED tests and repairs are committed on codex/phase126-06 through 61b8e786. Focused TUI tests, TUI/client/service typechecks, TUI build, dependency gate, and architecture gate pass. The full isolated TUI suite still fails because stale App integration fixtures throw from fetchWorkspaceActionInventory and expect the forbidden legacy fallback; update those fixtures and independently re-review before merge.

completed_tasks.name: Plan 07 scope-menu focus repair
completed_tasks.progress: Repairs are committed on codex/phase126-07-review-fix through 17ec414b, but second independent re-review found two blockers: hidden scope-menu items cannot be restored without reopening the menu, and helper-only tests do not exercise production scope-menu/modal/restore wiring. One warning also requires rejecting disabled/inert/CSS-hidden targets and verifying focus before suppressing fallback.

remaining_tasks.name: Update Plan 06 App integration fixtures for authoritative inventory and rerun the full isolated TUI suite
Independently re-review the complete Plan 06 repair and fix any surviving findings
Repair Plan 07 production-wired scope-menu restoration and unusable-target fallback with real DOM/controller tests
Cherry-pick only the clean reviewed Plan 06 and Plan 07 commit sets onto main and run post-merge gates
Execute Phase 126 Plan 08 conformance, full gates, and Phase 127 handoff

blockers.description: Plan 06 full npm run test:tui is not green because stale App integration fixtures intentionally throw during canonical inventory loading and still expect the prohibited enabled legacy fallback.
blockers.workaround: Update only the stale integration fixtures to provide authoritative action inventories, retain explicit loading/error fail-closed tests, rerun the full isolated TUI suite, then independently re-review.

blockers.description: Plan 07 captures a concrete scope-menu item but hides its ancestor menu before the overlay; current usability checks reject the hidden item, so Notes/confirmation cannot restore the actual invoking control.
blockers.workaround: Use a production-wired restoration target/callback that can reopen the originating menu, restore aria-expanded, validate connectivity/usability, and focus the concrete item; fall back when it no longer exists.

blockers.description: Plan 07 helper-only tests do not execute the actual scope-menu listener, canonical action callback, modal/controller, or restoreOverlayFocus wiring, so they can pass while production wiring is broken.
blockers.workaround: Add integration-level DOM/controller coverage through the same coordinator API production invokes, including Notes/confirmation, removed-item fallback, and Rename-cancel followed by unrelated Create.

blockers.description: Plan 07 focus usability accepts disabled, inert, CSS-hidden, or focus-failing targets and returns before terminal/visible-control fallback.
blockers.workaround: Reject unusable targets, revalidate inside the animation-frame callback, verify focus actually moved, and execute fallback otherwise.

decisions.decision: Use the two existing isolated repair worktrees rather than redispatching Plan 06 from scratch.
decisions.rationale: The safe-resume gate found committed implementation on codex/phase126-06 with no summary on main; redispatch risked duplicate and conflicting work.

decisions.decision: Do not merge either repair branch until its full relevant suite passes and an independent review is clean.
decisions.rationale: Repeated review found real authority and focus-lifecycle failures after locally green focused tests.

decisions.decision: Pause before another repair cycle because the orchestrator context crossed the workflow's POOR threshold.
decisions.rationale: Fresh-session resumption is safer than continuing a multi-cycle repair/re-review loop under degraded context.

decisions.decision: Retain the milestone release boundary: no tag, push, publish, release, or release-candidate claim before Phase 127 manual verification.
decisions.rationale: This remains an explicit project constraint and deterministic tests cannot impersonate live human approval.

next_action: Resume with /gsd-resume-work, acknowledge every blocking constraint, then update the stale Plan 06 App integration fixtures in /tmp/git-stacks-126-06 and rerun npm run test:tui before independent re-review. In parallel, repair the production-wired Plan 07 scope-menu restoration blockers in /tmp/git-stacks-126-07-review-fix. Do not start Plan 08 or merge either branch first.
context_notes: Main is at 9e095470 on main. /tmp/git-stacks-126-06 is clean at 61b8e786 on codex/phase126-06. /tmp/git-stacks-126-07-review-fix is clean at 17ec414b on codex/phase126-07-review-fix. Neither branch is merged. Plan 08 has not started. No background agents, servers, watchers, async jobs, or external jobs remain. Editor diagnostics shown during the session largely reflect isolated-worktree dependency/type-environment resolution and are not substitutes for executed package gates; rerun standard gates after integration on main.
